dsl_rule.translation_notes: Outside day pattern: high > prev_high AND low < prev_low. Outside close: close > prev_high (bullish) OR close < prev_low (bearish). Direction determined by close relative to prior day's range. Exit conditions inferred as reversal (close crossing back through prior day's close) since author provided no specific exit guidance. Pattern frequency warning noted but not encoded as exit condition.

backtest_rule.reason: Outside day pattern: high > prev_high AND low < prev_low. Outside close: close > prev_high (bullish) OR close < prev_low (bearish). Direction determined by close relative to prior day's range. Exit conditions inferred as reversal (close crossing back through prior day's close) since author provided no specific exit guidance. Pattern frequency warning noted but not encoded as exit condition.

source_rule_text: Trade an outside day with an outside close pattern, which represents a volatile day usually triggered by news and clearly resolved in one direction; if the close is opposite to a recent price move, it is also a key reversal day.
